source_pr.title: planner, executor: eliminate extra columns introduced by OrderBy upon Union
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
fix issue #8189 and issue #8199

### What is changed and how it works?
When a `SELECT` statement contains `UNION` and `ORDER BY` cause contains select statement,TiDB will generate extra columns, so I add `LogicalProjection` when building union LogicalPlan to eliminate generated extra columns.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

Side effects


Related changes

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select a from t1 union select a from t1 order by (select a+1);").Check(testkit.Rows("1", "2", "3")) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select a from t1 union select a from t1 order by (select a+1);").Check(testkit.Rows("1", "2", "3")) (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select a from t1 union select a from t1 order by (select a+1);").Check(testkit.Rows("1", "2", "3")) (executor/executor_test.go)
